input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.7.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.7.3.2
            TITLE: manually adjustable tuning devices must require tools to change

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.7.3.2: Manually adjustable tuning devices must require tools to change
IC.7.3.2 Manually adjustable tuning devices must require tools to change

final_answer: Manually adjustable tuning devices must require tools to change
